message:
feat(ft-nn): add Conv3d, recurrent modules, and expand nn module coverage

Major expansion of the neural network module library (+7998/-3501 lines):

- Add Conv3d for 3D convolution over [N, C_in, D, H, W] inputs with
  configurable kernel, stride, and padding per spatial dimension
- Fix ConvTranspose1d output tensor requires_grad initialization
  (was incorrectly set to true, should be false for output buffers)
- Restructure recurrent cell modules (RNNCell replacement) with
  expanded architecture support
- Significantly expand test coverage and module implementations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
